chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-4225 of 2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Disposed of matter: 1. For hearing of CMA No.17899 of 2025 (Restoration) 2. For hearing of CMA No.18135 of 2025 (Limitation) 19.09.2025 Mr. Asadullah Jan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent. ------------------ 2. Listed application bearing CMA No.18135/2025 has been preferred by the petitioner seeking condonation of filing restoration application. The instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 07.02.2025 and the application for restoration was filed on 30.08.2025, though the same was time barred as the same has to be filed within 30 days, due to unavailability of the counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel submits that such absence was not deliberate rather accidental due to medical emergency. He further submits that when it transpired to the knowledge of the petitioner, the petitioner filed restoration application. Learned counsel has furnished sufficient cause for delay in filing restoration application. Application is granted. 1. In view of above, instant application being CMA No.17899/2025 is allowed. Petition is restored back to its original position. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem.
